untranslatable_reason: Eve Top pattern requires detection of two similar price peaks with a valley between them. This requires pattern recognition logic (peak detection, similarity comparison, width analysis) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time technical indicators and comparison operators. The signal depends on identifying specific candlestick formations and geometric relationships that would need custom pattern-matching code rather than simple numerical comparisons.
translation_notes: The core Eve Top pattern detection (identifying two similar peaks, comparing their widths, measuring the valley depth) cannot be operationalized with available indicators. A partial proxy has been provided using pivot points to detect reversals at support/resistance levels, but this does not capture the specific pattern characteristics described by Bulkowski (two similar-looking tops with specific width properties and valley characteristics). The author did not provide quantitative exit conditions or success rate metrics.
